name: responsive-photo-gallery-monorepo
description: Workspace root: the gallery app, the enrichment service, and the shared in-tree packages. No application code lives here.

scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/config -w gallery -w enrichment
scripts.dev:deps: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.deps.yml up -d rpg-redis rpg-meilisearch rpg-enrichment-indexer rpg-enrichment-worker
scripts.dev:api: IMAGE_PATH=./debug-data/pics CONFIG_PATH=./debug-data/config PRIVATE_KEY=nonvolatile CACHE_PATH=./debug-data/cache TAGS_PATH=./debug-data/tags ENRICH_URL=http://localhost:8080 PORT=8000 DEBUG=express,responsive-photo-gallery:* node --watch gallery/bin/www
scripts.dev: npm run dev:deps && (trap 'kill 0' INT; npm run dev:api & npm run dev:ui & wait)
